LanguageData.FCP_Legion_CrucifiedSomeone.stages.0.des: I crucified someone. It was brutal work.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_Turned_In_A_Slave.stages.0.de: This colony turned in a prisoner to the Legion. Everyone shall know of our might!
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_WasCrucified.stages.0.descrip: I was nailed to a cross and left to suffer. The pain and humiliation will haunt me forever.
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_WasCrucified.stages.0.label: was crucified
LanguageData.FCP_Legion_WitnessedCrucifixion.stages.0: I saw someone crucified. The Legion's justice is brutal but effective.
